commands.review_summary:
This PR debounces and flushes the Control UI chat session picker search, ignores stale picker responses, adds model/provider matching to `sessions.list` search, and expands mock/test coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main keeps non-empty picker input as draft text unless Enter/search-click applies it, with no debounce or blur path. I did not run browser or test commands because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane: the branch has no blocking actionable finding from this review; the remaining action is protected maintainer review and validation.
